message:
🐛 Fix stuck progress banner after restart

When kc-agent restarts via startup-oauth.sh, it kills itself before
sending the "done" WebSocket message. The progress banner stays stuck
on "Restarting..." forever.

Fix: on WebSocket reconnect, if we were showing "restarting" status,
the reconnection itself proves the restart succeeded — show "done".
Also reduced reconnect interval from 10s to 5s for faster recovery.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
